\chapter{Results and Discussion}
Table~\ref{tab:results} summarizes the fictional verification points. Reported
precision does not exceed the precision supported by the simulated apparatus.

\begin{table}[htbp]
  \centering
  \caption{Calibration verification results.}
  \label{tab:results}
  \begin{tabular}{ccc}
    \hline
    Reference temperature, K & Raw error, K & Corrected error, K \\
    \hline
    220.0 & 1.7 & 0.3 \\
    270.0 & 1.9 & 0.4 \\
    320.0 & 1.8 & 0.5 \\
    \hline
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}

The residuals showed no monotonic trend across the tested range. Because the
data are simulated, the result demonstrates document and workflow behavior only;
it does not establish flight qualification or instrument performance.
